title: STACKABLES ~ 50 Pack Compartment Party Platter Trays ~ Sugarcane Bagasse Disposable Sectional Serving Platters ~ Divided Food Tray with 5 Compartments
features: MATERIAL & SIZE -- This compartment food storage tray is made with sturdy sugarcane bagasse material. This white compartment tray measures 10 x 10 x 1.4 in inches, the sectional plate is perfect for sharing snacks and appetizers with guests. The plate is just the right size for fruits, dried fruits, desserts and snacks. It's great for entertaining family and friends at get-togethers.

LIGHTWEIGHT & CONVENIENT -- These 5 compartment trays work well for all kinds of food items - great for dips, assorted nuts, biscuits, vegetables, tapas. Lightweight & convenient, its a useful addition to your party, being handy & attractive, thus contributing to the table decor. Conveniently serve a variety of food with our 5 section serving platters.

PERFECT FOR -- These 5 section round compartment platters are perfect for entertaining family and friends at parties. These compartment tray platters are ideal for families, caterers, office gatherings, banquet facilities and any other indoor/outdoor events. These trays are perfect for home, office parties, family dinner and friends get-togethers.

INSULATION PROPERTIES -- Sectional trays are thermal resistant and can hold hot food up to 95 degree Celsius. Divided snack plate have insulation properties that retain heat for a longer time compared to paper and plastic containers. They are microwave safe and can be used to reheat food. They are refrigerator safe and therefore can be used to store food until consumption.

FASHIONABLE & CLASSIC -- Organize and present your party snacks or munchies in style using our classy and convenient white 5 section sugarcane bagasse tray that makes hosting a party or get together fun and fashionable. Classic round shape with 5 spacious compartments make this disposable platter ideal for dips, chips, veggies, fruits, nuts, or snacks.
